item.title: Version 0.1.0
item.description: - fix: appcast enclosure quoting bug and iOS export compliance (US-010, US-012) - fix: appcast generation — use sed instead of awk for multiline XML, accept --ed-signature from CI - fix: bypass exportArchive for Developer ID — extract and codesign app from archive directly - chore: add ExportOptions plists to CI path filters - fix: use manual signing for Developer ID export — cloud signing not available (US-012) - fix: install iOS platform on macOS 15 CI runner before archive (US-010) - fix: remove base64 decode from ASC_KEY_CONTENT — secret is raw .p8 text (US-010) - feat: add tab bar to Project Settings splitting Project and Session Actions (TSK-001) - feat: widen Project Settings card from 600pt to 1000pt max (TSK-001) - feat: iOS Xcode project fixes — shared scheme, aps-environment, archive verified (US-002)

item.title: Version 0.1.0
item.description: - fix: appcast generation — use sed instead of awk for multiline XML, accept --ed-signature from CI - fix: bypass exportArchive for Developer ID — extract and codesign app from archive directly - chore: add ExportOptions plists to CI path filters - fix: use manual signing for Developer ID export — cloud signing not available (US-012) - fix: install iOS platform on macOS 15 CI runner before archive (US-010) - fix: remove base64 decode from ASC_KEY_CONTENT — secret is raw .p8 text (US-010) - feat: add tab bar to Project Settings splitting Project and Session Actions (TSK-001) - feat: widen Project Settings card from 600pt to 1000pt max (TSK-001) - feat: iOS Xcode project fixes — shared scheme, aps-environment, archive verified (US-002) - feat: complete Apple portal setup with real Sparkle Ed25519 key (US-001)
